title: Tensura: New Beginnings
description: A Tensura: Reincarnated modpack, with optimization mods and QoL mods. 1.19.2
body: This modpack aims to provide a base for people to enjoy the Tensura: Reincarnated mod no matter the hardware. The modpack is built with maintainability and simplicity in mind. This means the modpack only has a few quality-of-life or visual enhancements that are included in the pack by default.
